description: The chatMutation onError handler checks isUnauthorizedError and redirects to /api/login, but this redirect path doesn't match the Clerk authentication flow. Should redirect to Clerk sign-in or trigger Clerk's auth flow instead of a custom /api/login endpoint.
successCriteria: Unauthorized errors trigger Clerk's built-in sign-in flow
No redirect to /api/login (which may not exist)
User can re-authenticate without losing modal state
